Indirectly from you. For example, from observing your actions on our Website or through the use of our App(s) or Services or interactions with our advertisers.

6) Activity information relating to internet or other electronic networks such as browsing or searching history, or interaction with a Website, ad, or app
Collected: YES

We retain your data for the following periods:
1. Account Data
•
Active accounts: Duration of account existence
•
Deleted accounts: 30 days after deletion
•
Payment information: 7 years (legal requirement)
2. Usage Data
•
Login records: 90 days
• Activity logs: 30 days
•
Error logs: 60 days
3. Communication Records
•
Support tickets: 2 years
•
Email correspondence: 1 year
•
Chat logs: 90 days
4. Al-Generated Content
•
Generated images: 30 days
• Training data: Deleted immediately after processing
•
Model data: Not retained

Cookie Categories
1. Essential Cookies (No Consent Required)
• Security
• Load balancing
• User authentication
2. Functional Cookies (Consent Required)
• Language preferences
• User customization
• Session management
3. Analytics Cookies (Consent Required)
• Usage statistics
• Performance monitoring
• Error tracking
4. Marketing Cookies (Explicit Consent Required)
• Advertising
• Social media integration
• Behavioral tracking
